---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
  categories: false
---
```{=html}
<style>
  .page-header {
    padding: 48px 48px 32px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
  .page-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .page-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    line-height: 1;
    color: #1a1916;
  }
  .page-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    max-width: 480px;
    margin-top: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* Override Quarto's default grid card styles */
  .quarto-grid-item {
    background: #f7f5f1 !important;
    border: none !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    padding: 36px 32px !important;
    transition: background 0.2s !important;  }
  .quarto-grid-item:hover {
    background: #f0ede7 !important;
  }
 .quarto-grid-item .card-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 24px !important;
    font-weight: 500 !important;
    color: #1a1916 !important;
    line-height: 1.2 !important;
    margin-bottom: 12px !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em !important;
  }
  .quarto-grid-item .card-text {
    font-size: 13px !important;
    color: #6b6960 !important;
    font-weight: 300 !important;
    line-height: 1.65 !important;
  }
  .quarto-grid-item .listing-date {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    color: #2d4a3e !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em !important;
    margin-bottom: 14px !important;
  }
  .quarto-grid-item .listing-categories .listing-category {
    font-size: 10px !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    color: #a8a59e !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 4px 0 0 !important;
  }

  /* Remove Quarto's default card shadow and image border radius */
 .quarto-grid-item.card {
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border: none !important;
    outline: none !important;
  }

  /* middle divider between cards */
  .quarto-grid-item:nth-child(odd) {
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1) !important;
  }

  /* line above each row */
  .quarto-grid-item {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1) !important;
  }
  .quarto-grid-item img {
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    margin-bottom: 20px !important;
  }

  /* Listing grid gap */
  .list.grid.quarto-listing-cols-2 {
    gap: 0px !important;
    background: #f7f5f1 !important;
    border: none !important;
    padding: 0 48px 48px !important;
  }
</style>

<div class="page-header">
  <p class="page-eyebrow">Selected work</p>
  <h1 class="page-title">Projects</h1>
  <p class="page-desc">A collection of work from my time at UCSB — spanning R, data analysis, economics, and environmental studies.</p>
</div>
```
